title: TNSRLM Erode Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 120 Posts
short_info: The Erode District Administration, under the District Level Implementation Unit, Women's Programme, Tamil Nadu State Rural Livelihood Mission (TNSRLM), has released an official notification for 120 Community Bank Coordinator (Samudaya Vangi Orunginaippaalar) vacancies at the Gram Panchayat level.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by the District Administration: | Minimum Education: Class 12 (Higher Secondary) pass. Must have good reading and writing skills in Tamil and English, along with numerical/calculation ability. | Maximum Age: Not exceeding 35 years. | Must have worked as a Self-Help Group (SHG) Promoter for a minimum of 2 years. | Must be a woman SHG member affiliated to the Panchayat-level Federation in the respective Gram Panchayat where the vacancy exists. Must belong to the target community identified through the People's Welfare Survey (Makkal Nilai Aayvu). Candidates with computer skills and a valid two-wheeler driving licence will be given preference. Must possess an Android smartphone with the ability to send SMS/WhatsApp messages and operate mobile applications. Must have experience in visiting banks, conducting transactions, and filling loan application forms. Must have good communication skills.

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit their applications in the following manner:
Prepare the application along with copies of all relevant certificates (educational qualification, experience, SHG membership, age proof, caste certificate, etc.).
Submit applications either in person or by post to the concerned Panchayat-level Federation in the respective Gram Panchayat where the vacancy exists.
Applications must reach on or before June 15, 2026.
For vacancy details specific to each Gram Panchayat, contact the concerned Block-level Federation Office.
important_instructions: Only SHG members residing in the respective Gram Panchayats where vacancies exist are eligible to apply. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis.
For details of Gram Panchayat-level vacancies, candidates may contact the concerned Block-level Federation Office.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Erode District Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form along with the required documents is 15 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies have been announced under Erode District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Erode District Administration has announced 120 Community Bank Coordinator vacancies at the Gram Panchayat level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Community Bank Coordinator posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Class 12 (Higher Secondary) and should possess good reading, writing, and numerical skills in both Tamil and English.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Erode District Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants should be not more than 35 years of age as on the prescribed date mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Who is eligible to apply for the Community Bank Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Only women Self-Help Group (SHG) members affiliated with the concerned Panchayat-level Federation and residing in the respective Gram Panchayat can apply.

faq.question: Q6. Is any work experience required for Erode District Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes. Candidates must have worked as an SHG Promoter for at least 2 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for Erode District Community Bank Coordinator Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline, either in person or by post, to the concerned Panchayat-level Federation.

faq.question: Q8. What additional skills will be preferred during the selection process?
faq.answer: Candidates with computer knowledge, a valid two-wheeler driving licence, Android smartphone usage skills, and banking transaction experience will be given preference.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be selected for the Community Bank Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on application screening, eligibility verification, educational qualifications, experience, and other criteria prescribed by the District Administration.

faq.question: Q10. Where can candidates get Gram Panchayat-wise vacancy details?
faq.answer: Applicants can contact the concerned Block-level Federation Office to obtain detailed vacancy information for their respective Gram Panchayats.
